name: Summiz.ai
description: Summiz.ai is a platform that provides AI-generated summaries for videos and podcasts, making information consumption more efficient.
longDescription: Summiz provides concise and holistic summaries of videos and podcasts, making information consumption more efficient for professionals and knowledge enthusiasts. Our summaries are not just a list of key points; they come with a concise overview, a comprehensive breakdown, and a full-length article with voice narration. We support content from YouTube and aim to save you hours of filler content, helping you learn fast and get smarter.
features: AI-powered summarization for videos and podcasts
